name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BACKLOG-2
title: format-feature-context.py should include tdd_state in feature context
description: format-feature-context.py reads JSON entries that include 'tdd_state' but discards it. The Agent could benefit from knowing whether a feature is 'unblessed' (avoid for major changes), 'test-green' (safe to touch), or in another transitional state. Include tdd_state in the formatted output so the Agent can make better scope decisions.
